payload.answer: Could not extract or store article takeaways because the fetch returned 404 network error.
payload.decision: No durable memory committed because the source could not be retrieved; the only supported fact is the fetch failure.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be accessed, so there is no reliable source content to resolve into a memory entity.

payload.intent: User requested that the article at the provided URL be remembered, but the fetch result failed with a 404 network error.

details: No source claims were available to convert into memory cards.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL with the corrected scheme/format.
Provide the article text or an accessible link.
If the URL is intentionally missing, supply a summary to evaluate for memory storage.
